# LocalClaw.io

> LocalClaw helps people choose and run local AI models on their own hardware. The site covers local LLMs, TTS/ASR speech models, RAM guides, Apple Silicon and NVIDIA hardware, and the LocalClaw macOS Control Center for OpenClaw.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://localclaw.io/) - LocalClaw overview, OpenClaw control center, model finder entry point, and app positioning.
- [LLM List](https://localclaw.io/llm-list.html) - Interactive catalogue of 188 LLM records with RAM fit, quantization, quality, coding, reasoning, speed, LM Studio links, and local install guidance.
- [TTS List](https://localclaw.io/tts-list.html) - Interactive catalogue of 57 local TTS, ASR, and speech AI models with quality, speed, languages, hardware, licenses, and install commands.
- [Computers](https://localclaw.io/computers.html) - Apple Silicon and NVIDIA machines for local AI, with RAM tiers, compatible model picks, and buying links.
- [Pricing](https://localclaw.io/pricing.html) - LocalClaw macOS beta lifetime access, one-time $49 license, no subscription.
- [Blog](https://localclaw.io/blog/) - Editorial guides on local AI, models, hardware, privacy, and OpenClaw workflows.

## SEO Silo Pages

- [All model pages](https://localclaw.io/models/) - Static pages for individual LLMs.
- [All speech model pages](https://localclaw.io/tts/) - Static pages for individual TTS, ASR, and speech models.
- [Practical local AI guides](https://localclaw.io/guides/) - Short decision paths that connect hardware, RAM, models, TTS workflows, and the next LocalClaw action.
- [RAM guides](https://localclaw.io/ram/) - Local AI model recommendations by memory tier.
- [Hardware guides](https://localclaw.io/hardware/) - Local AI model recommendations by machine.
- [Use-case guides](https://localclaw.io/use-case/) - Model recommendations by workload such as chat, coding, RAG, reasoning, multilingual work, and speed.

## Guided Paths

- [Best local LLMs for Mac mini M4](https://localclaw.io/guides/best-local-llms-for-mac-mini-m4.html) - Model picks for Apple Silicon desktops with unified memory.
- [Best local LLMs for 16GB RAM](https://localclaw.io/guides/best-local-llms-for-16gb-ram.html) - Laptop-safe recommendations for local chat, coding and reasoning.
- [Best local LLMs for coding](https://localclaw.io/guides/best-local-llms-for-coding.html) - Private code assistants and agent-friendly local model choices.
- [Best local TTS for voice cloning](https://localclaw.io/guides/best-local-tts-for-voice-cloning.html) - Speech model picks for private local voice workflows.

## Product Context

LocalClaw is a native macOS Control Center for OpenClaw. It focuses on local and sovereign AI workflows: local models, agents, channels, scheduled jobs, Kanban-style task orchestration, and dashboard health checks. The site does not require signup for the model finder, and the macOS app is sold as lifetime beta access for $49.

- [NVIDIA RTX Spark and Local AI PCs](https://localclaw.io/blog/nvidia-rtx-spark-local-ai-pc.html)
- [MisoTTS 8B local TTS guide](https://localclaw.io/blog/misotts-8b-local-tts.html)
- [Apple Silicon vs NVIDIA for Local AI](https://localclaw.io/blog/apple-silicon-vs-nvidia.html)
- [OpenClaw Guide](https://localclaw.io/blog/openclaw-guide.html)
